posts.text: BREAKING: Federal campaign-finance records reveal that former intelligence analyst Gavin Wilde is an anti-Trump Democrat like his co-conspirator Eric Ciaramella in the first impeachment plot, and contributed to Kamala Harris's 2024 presidential campaign.
